comment:
The neighbor and I had some work done on the property line.  This company parked a white truck on my yard instead of my driveway.  The owner showed up and started arguing with me saying it wasn't a big deal, but there was plumbing in that area!  They finally moved the truck, but instead of backing up and using the driveway, they drove through the yard.  How unbelievable and disrespectful.

Awful company with terrible leadership.  DO NOT USE.
draft_response: We are sorry about your experience, Ba. This does not reflect the standard we hold at Black Hill Landscaping. We would welcome the chance to speak with you directly and address your concerns. Please reach out at (817) 995-0324.
